atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right big toe pain and redness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a two-week history of intermittent right big toe pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain has become more pronounced last week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is throbbing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is occasionally sharp.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is especially with movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports significant pain and inability to walk during a trade show convention last week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent injury or trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking ibuprofen twice daily with limited relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation of the right great toe joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited due to pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a palpable bone spur on the dorsal aspect of the great toe.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsal flexion causes pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Plantar flexion causes pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's presentation is consistent with hallux rigidus

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hallux rigidus

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports secondary osteoarthritis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Findings include a large spur

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Findings include cartilage loss

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 1 tablet daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in two weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician considers a shot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician considers surgical intervention

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to continue with regular activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to monitor for medication-related side effects

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician encourages the patient to continue fishing
